title: Plan Manifest (orchestrator + plan-tree superset)
description: Validates manifests under ~/.claude-plans/ for both shapes: (a) orchestrator task-list manifests (consumed by the autonomous orchestrator), (b) plan-tree status/scope manifests (live_mutation_scope, top_level_status, harness_validated[], git_tag_published — added by Plan 80/81 SP01 T-2 + T-27 on 2026-05-07). Manifests may carry either shape or both. additionalProperties: true permits forward-compatible field additions per dbt schema-evolution pattern.

schema_version.description: Schema version. v1 accepts both `"1.0.0"` (legacy orchestrator manifests) and `1` (plan-tree manifests).

spec_path.description: Absolute path to the spec.md file for this project

architecture_path.description: Absolute path to architecture.md, if one exists

status.description: Top-level plan status (R-27 / plan-index classifier). Optional for manifests that inherit status from spec.md, required for manifests acting as the plan's status anchor.

type.description: Manifest scope. plan = top-level plan; sub-plan = component under a plan. SP01 sub-plan manifests carry sub-plan.

parent_plan.description: Top-level plan slug (no path, no extension). Required at depth ≥ 3 per CLAUDE.md plan-tree convention rule #5 (R-28). Plan-root files (depth 2) exempt; handoff.md exempt at any depth.

sub_plan_id.description: Two-digit ordinal of this sub-plan within its parent (01, 02, ...). Execution order, not creation order.

source_packet.description: Absolute path to the canonical alignment packet that locked this plan's scope.

phase_2_scaffolded_at.description: Date when /new-plan or /backlog-research scaffolded this plan tree.

id.description: Task identifier (T-1, T-2, ..., T-3.5 for inserts).

top_level_status.description: PLAN-TREE FIELD (T-2 / Path D step 4 amendment). Distinct from loose `status` field; this is the canonical lifecycle marker consumed by R-55 sunset trigger evaluation, R-46-cousin gate (T-27), and active-gates-rebuild. Transitions: aligned → in_progress → complete → closed (or superseded). `closed` requires git_tag_published populated for foundation-distributed plans.

git_tag_published.description: PLAN-TREE FIELD (T-2 / Path D step 4 amendment). Per-tag publication record for foundation-repo distribution. Helper reads this object to evaluate R-55 sunset trigger conditions WITHOUT shelling to `git tag --list` (deterministic + fast).

sha.description: Commit SHA the tag points to.

live_mutation_scope.description: PLAN-TREE FIELD (T-2). Declares plan-scoped live-mutation gate. Plan-lifetime; retires when plan closes via three-phase sequence (Phase A parallel-run → Phase B helper retires → Phase C manifest entry retires). Per packet §3.2.

inherits_from.description: Master plan slug for sub-plan manifests; null for top-level plans. Sub-plan declares ADDITIVE-ONLY scope: scope_paths/exempt_paths/launchd_labels/g2_commit_denylist UNION with master.

scope_paths.description: Glob patterns under which mutations gate. e.g., ["$HOME/.claude/**"]

exempt_paths.description: Post-detection carve-outs. Sub-plan can extend, NOT subtract. Generalizes Plan 71 hardcoded ~/.claude/projects/** carve-out.

detection_signals.description: OR semantics — ANY one tier triggers DETECTED=1.

transcript_regex.description: Tier-3 fallback. OPT-IN ONLY. Locked to $CLAUDE_SESSION_ID at runtime (NOT find-mtime); closes Plan 71 SP09 Incident δ stochasticity.

deterministic_only.description: If true, transcript_regex is disabled regardless of declaration.

override.description: Out-of-band override mechanisms. NO in-band fields permitted (e.g., bypass: true is schema-rejected per A8 anti-success criterion).

nonce_sha_anchor.description: Git ref (tag or branch) whose SHA must equal the third tab-separated field of the nonce content.

nonce_consume_strategy.description: LOCKED to (c) both = basename-match-env primary + scope carve-out. first_match_glob is DEPRECATED; A5 anti-success criterion.

nonce_affinity_env.description: Env var name caller sets to indicate which nonce basename to match (e.g., PLAN_71_NONCE_TASK).

bypass_env_var.description: Shell-rc-only escape hatch. Per-call env scoping in Claude Code prevents agent self-issuance.

layer_3.description: L3 writer-pause declarations consumed by l3-pause-helper.sh (T-4). Lint at manifest-author time validates against l3-writer-registry.json (T-10).

expected_quiescence_period_seconds.description: k8s drain pattern; helper sleeps this duration after pause-broadcast. Default 30s.

pause_via.description: v1 mechanism for UserPromptSubmit writers (no native pause API).

g2_commit_denylist.description: Path globs added to ~/.claude/.git/hooks/pre-commit denylist for the duration of this plan's gate.

match_action.description: deny=block+log; warn=log+advisory+ALLOW (new-plan onboarding soak); dryrun=log only, no user-visible message, ALLOW (pre-deploy validation).

error_action.description: deny=fail-closed on helper crash (default; security-gate posture); ignore=fail-open (Phase A bootstrap exception ONLY).

sunset.description: Plan retirement state machine. Three explicit phases A→B→C per packet §3.14.

trigger_conditions.description: ALL must hold for retirement eligibility.

deferral_until.description: Explicit calendar gate. e.g., "2026-05-17" for R-55.

phase.description: Current phase. A=parallel-run; B=helper retired, manifest entry active; C=manifest entry retired.

teardown_status.description: Coarse retirement marker for human-readable status. Inherits Plan 71 r55_sunset.teardown_status semantics.

harness_validated.description: PLAN-TREE FIELD (T-27 / Path D step 4 amendment item (a)). Verdict-pass entries from SP08 dogfood-harness. R-46-cousin gate (foundation-repo .git/hooks/pre-commit) refuses sub-plan top_level_status flip from in_progress → complete unless a matching verdict-pass entry exists at current foundation-repo HEAD within last 7 days. Cross-sub-plan invalidation via post-commit hook when sister sub-plan modifies files in validated sub-plan's live_mutation_scope.scope_paths.

sha.description: Foundation-repo HEAD SHA at run time.

judges.description: LLM judges if verdict ensemble used.

pinned_reference_v.description: Pinned reference version against which the harness ran.

tier.description: Tier-1 = structural assertion (pass/fail deterministic); tier-2 = behavioral assertion (judge-mediated); tier-3 = soft observability (advisory).

evidence_path.description: Path to harness output artifacts (logs, diffs, screenshots).

harness_freshness.description: Freshness band relative to current foundation-repo HEAD. R-46-cousin gate accepts only `fresh` for top_level_status flip.
